# nvim — keybindings

## nvim

### Find

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space Space` | Find files (root dir) |
| `Space /` | Live grep (search in files) |
| `Space e` | File explorer (neo-tree) |
| `Space ,` | Switch buffer |

### Buffers

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Shift+H / Shift+L` | Previous / next buffer |
| `Space b d` | Delete buffer |

### Git

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space g g` | Lazygit (root dir) |

### LSP

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `g d` | Go to definition |
| `K` | Hover documentation |
| `Space c a` | Code action |
| `Space c f` | Format buffer |

### Session

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space q q` | Quit all |
